title: Road to Elected Fellowships: AAAS and IBNS — Seminar Slides (Hohmann)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2024-02-29 New Faculty Development Seminar 'Road to Elected Fellowships: AAAS and IBNS' presented by Christine Hohmann, PhD (MSU RCMI). Walks faculty through the pathway to election as a Fellow of the American Association for the Advancement of Science (AAAS) and the International Behavioral Neuroscience Society (IBNS). Part of the 2024-02-29 Society Fellowships panel.
